Productivity

How To Do Things Better

GrowthSpare

2026-06-25 · 4 min read

AI Tip

Use AI to prototype outlines and ideas, then add human context and polish before publishing.

Improving the way you work doesn't require big changes — small, consistent improvements compound.

Start with the right goals

Focus on outcomes rather than activity. Measure results and iterate.

Improve communication

Make decisions explicit, keep documentation short, and reduce context-switching.

Automate repeatable work

Identify repetitive tasks and automate them where appropriate.

This is an example blog post to demonstrate file-based blogs and inserting an AI snippet.
